title: Company Secretary (CS)
description: Lead ROC filings, board governance, AGM/EGM management and MCA compliance for our corporate clients.

title: Legal Associate
description: Draft and review commercial contracts, assist in M&A due diligence, and support senior partners on corporate law mandates.

title: Compliance Analyst
description: Monitor and manage regulatory compliance calendars for clients under SEBI, RBI and MCA frameworks. Freshers welcome.
